emails.subject: FW: Past Due Process
emails.body: FW: Past Due Process Does this process conform w/ regulatory reqts?

emails.subject: RE: Past Due Process
emails.body: So the short answer is that EES needs to change its procedures? Also, is t= he 50kw right for all markets? Jim

emails.subject: RE: Past Due Process
emails.body: Yes we need to amend the timeline to comply with the rules. The 50kw thresh= old is for the ERCOT market.
